case_title: SANCHEZ AND SONS, LLC VS. VPSF, INC DBA REAL FOOD COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-06-2018 CONTINUED TO FEB-05-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-15-2018 CONTINUED TO SEP-26-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
